bird.name: Buff-breasted flycatcher
bird.summary: The buff-breasted flycatcher (Empidonax fulvifrons) is a small passerine bird in the family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is found…

relations.subject: Buff-breasted flycatcher
relations.evidence: inexpectatus: southern and south-central Honduras During the breeding season and in its year-round range the buff-breasted flycatcher inhabits wide mountain canyons with open pine, pine-oak, and oak forest that has a grassy understory with some bushes
relations.object_summary: 大型猛禽和食腐鸟偏好的高崖栖息环境。
